reply:
Hi Victor,

I’m truly sorry about the mix-up with your Down Vest (ORD-1021). I’ve reviewed your order, and I see the issue—you received the olive color instead of the navy you ordered. Since the vest is still in its original condition with tags attached, it qualifies for a full refund under our standard return policy.

I’ll process the refund of $88.00 to your original payment method right away, and you should see it in 3-5 business days depending on your bank. No return shipping is needed. I’ve also flagged this to our team to prevent similar issues in the future. Thanks for your patience, and I apologize again for the inconvenience.
retrieved_policy_chunks:
R4.2 Warranty - misuse
Damage resulting from misuse, accident, or normal wear and tear is NOT covered by warranty. Such claims MUST be
declined, though the agent MAY offer a one-time 15% discount code on a replacement purchase as goodwill.

R2.1 Shipping - delay
If an order is delivered more than 5 business days after the promised delivery date, the customer MUST be offered a
shipping credit equal to the shipping fee paid (minimum $10 credit). Delays of 5 business days or fewer do NOT qualify
for compensation.

R7 Escalation - frequent returner
Any customer with 3 or more returns in the past 90 days MUST be flagged for manual review before any new return or
refund is approved, even if the individual request would otherwise qualify under R1. The agent MUST NOT auto-approve
the remedy; the reply should acknowledge the request and state it is under review.

R6 Escalation - high value or unclear
Any case where the disputed value exceeds $200, or that does not clearly fall under rules R1-R5, MUST be escalated to
a human senior agent. The system or agent MUST NOT resolve such cases autonomously, even if a lower-numbered
rule appears to apply.
